title: oldenlandia fastigiata var. somala
intro: Oldenlandia fastigiata var. somala, also known as Somalian Oldenlandia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is an herbaceous plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, Oldenlandia fastigiata var. somala is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
